_hyperscript.description: _hyperscript is a small scripting language for adding interactivity to web pages, from the author of htmx.

Pagefind.description: Pagefind is a fully static search library for static sites.

Tabler Icons.description: Tabler Icons is a free open-source set of SVG icons.

Odometer.js.description: Odometer.js is a JavaScript library for smoothly transitioning numbers.

RapiDoc.description: RapiDoc is a web component for rendering OpenAPI/Swagger documentation.

Material for MkDocs.description: Material for MkDocs is a documentation theme for the MkDocs static site generator.

Woosmap.description: Woosmap is a location and mapping platform for store locators and geolocation.

VdoCipher.description: VdoCipher is a video hosting platform with DRM protection.

Airwallex.description: Airwallex is a global payments and financial platform.

Xendit.description: Xendit is a payment gateway for Southeast Asia.

Supermetrics.description: Supermetrics is a marketing data and analytics pipeline tool.

TWIPLA.description: TWIPLA (formerly Visitor Analytics) is a website intelligence and analytics platform.

Docebo.description: Docebo is a cloud-based learning management system.

Sensei LMS.description: Sensei LMS is a learning management plugin for WordPress by Automattic.

Formbricks.description: Formbricks is an open-source survey and experience management platform.

Treatwell.description: Treatwell is an online booking platform for hair and beauty salons.

YouCanBookMe.description: YouCanBookMe is an online appointment scheduling service.

HappyOrNot.description: HappyOrNot collects customer and employee feedback via smiley terminals and web widgets.

Rackspace.description: Rackspace is a managed cloud computing and hosting provider.

OpenWeatherMap.description: OpenWeatherMap provides weather data and forecasts via API.

APILayer.description: APILayer offers a marketplace of developer APIs (currency, IP, validation, etc.).

UpCloud Object Storage.description: UpCloud Object Storage is an S3-compatible object storage service.
